name: Not-so-Sinful Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup quick or old fashioned oats, uncooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray bottom of a 13x9 inch baking pan with nonstick vegetable cooking spray.
3. In a large saucepan, combine applesauce and chocolate. Heat over low heat, stirring frequently, until chocolate is melted. Remove from heat; let cool slightly.
4. Add sugar and applesauce; mix well. Stir in egg whites and vanilla; mix well.
5. Add the combined oats, baking powder, and salt; mix well.
6. Spread evenly in prepared pan.
7. Bake for 22-25 minutes or until center is set and edges pull away from sides of pan.
8. Cool completely.
9. Sprinkle with powdered sugar before serving, if desired.
10. Cut into 24 bars.
11. Store loosely covered. Makes 24 servings.
